serviceDescription: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams (KDS) is a massively scalable and durable real-time data streaming service.

templates.title: Provisioned Mode
templates.description: With provisioned capacity mode, you specify the number of shards necessary for your application based on its write and read request rate. A shard is a unit of capacity that provides 1 MB/second of write and 2 MB/second of read throughout.

cards.title: Service Settings
cards.helpText: Please visit the link to learn more about pricing.

components.label: Buffer for growth and to absorb un-expected peaks
Number of Consumer Applications
components.description: Consider using Enhanced Fan Out consumers if you need 70ms latency and have more than two consumers

components.label: Duration of data retention
components.description: Kinesis Data Streams stores your data for 24 hours by default. You’re charged extended data retention rates for the first seven days and then charged a lower GB-month rate for data stored beyond seven days up to your specified retention period.

templates.title: On-Demand Mode
templates.description: With on-demand capacity mode, you pay per GB of data written and read from your data streams. You do not need to specify how much read and write throughput you expect your application to perform. Kinesis Data Streams instantly accommodates your workloads as they ramp up or down.

cards.title: Service Settings
cards.helpText: Please visit the link to learn more about pricing.

components.label: Average record size
components.description: Each record will be rounded up to the nearest 1 KB (1,024 bytes). For example, if your data records are 4.5 KB each, Kinesis Data Streams will count each record as 5 KB of data ingested.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Maximum throughput capacity for on-demand streams is 10 GB/s. Please use the provisioned mode to create an estimate.

components.label: Number of Consumer Applications
components.description: Consider using Enhanced Fan Out consumers if you need 70ms latency and have more than two consumers

components.placeholder: Enter the number of data retention days
components.description: Kinesis Data Streams stores your data for 24 hours by default. You’re charged extended data retention rates for the first seven days and then charged a lower GB-month rate for data stored beyond seven days up to your specified retention period.
